narrative:
Liberty Twp 27 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,507 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
